---
# The title MUST start with "FIMS Weekly - "
title: "FIMS Weekly - May 11–15, 2026"
date: "May 11, 2026"
# Change the following categories accordingly, but you MUST keep fims-weekly
categories:
  - fims-weekly
three-big-things:
  bt1: "As we shift to using 'translational units' to compile FIMS, much like how RTMB compiles, we are also thinking about storing metrics related to building FIMS, e.g., compile time and size. This week Matthew is working on getting [PR #1430](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/pull/1430) and [PR #1336](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/pull/1336) to work together."
  bt2: "Week 2 of community bonding with the Google Summer of Code Contributors. We are meeting with each of them to finalize their proposals."
  bt3: "Reworking this weekly newsletter to be more informative about FIMS development by changing the Photo of the Week to a Project Summary of the Week."
# Announcements go below because of formatting that quarto doesnt transfer over from the yml
# If there is no code club or seaside chat, just delete those lines and the template will handle it for you
upcoming-events:
# If you have any additional events, uncomment and fill out the additional events section below.
# If there is no actual photo you can delete include-photo, path, and alt-text 
# and the template will handle it for you. 
# If there is code instead, please uncomment the section below named photo-code 
# but still include the text portion under photo.
photo:
  text: "Just this morning I learned that issues associated with a milestone can be ordered to show users which issues will be worked on first. This should help communicate how work will be prioritized within FIMS."
  include-photo: true
  path: "https://github.blog/wp-content/uploads/2016/07/6629b442-42c7-11e6-954b-88a57821a36a.gif?resize=1600%2C850"
  alt-text: "A movie clip showing the drag and drop feature of prioritizing issues within a Milestone."
---

{{< include "fims-weekly-template.qmd" >}}

::: {#announcements}
- FIMS CIE Review has been turned in and should be public next week.
::: 

::: {#additional-events}
### Tuesday, May 12
**NMFS Cloud Workstations: Part 1**

Time: 14:00–15:00 E; 11:00–12:00 P; 10:00–11:00 AK; 8:00–9:00 H
Location: Virtual
Online: [Google Meet](https://meet.google.com/unsupported?meetingCode=djv-qgow-qwe&ref=https://meet.google.com/djv-qgow-qwe)

### Thursday, May 14
**NMFS Cloud Workstations: Part 1**

Time: 16:00–17:00 E; 13:00–14:00 P; 12:00–13:00 AK; 10:00–11:00 H
Location: Virtual
Online: [Google Meet](https://meet.google.com/unsupported?meetingCode=djv-qgow-qwe&ref=https://meet.google.com/djv-qgow-qwe)
:::

<!-- ::: {#photo-code}
::: -->

```{=html}
<script src="https://giscus.app/client.js"
        data-repo="noaa-fims/FIMS"
        data-repo-id="R_kgDOGvEn5A"
        data-category="Blog discussions"
        data-category-id="DIC_kwDOGvEn5M4C-hls"
        data-mapping="title"
        data-strict="1"
        data-reactions-enabled="1"
        data-emit-metadata="0"
        data-input-position="bottom"
        data-theme="preferred_color_scheme"
        data-lang="en"
        crossorigin="anonymous"
        async>
</script>
```
